mapper.select: SELECT tree.TREE_CD AS comboVal , tree.TREE_NM AS comboLabel , tree.TREE_NM AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_SW_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD, '') = 'ROOT' ORDER BY tree.TREE_CD

SELECT tree.TREE_CD AS comboVal , tree.TREE_NM AS comboLabel , tree.UPPER_TREE_CD AS comboTooltip FROM DOCS_SW_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD, '') != 'ROOT' ORDER BY tree.TREE_CD

SELECT COALESCE( MAX( CASE WHEN split_part(SW_NO, '-', 4) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(split_part(SW_NO, '-', 4) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END ), 0 ) + 1 FROM DOCS_SW WHERE SW_NO LIKE 'K8-CCB-L%-%' AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND split_part(SW_NO, '-', 3) ~ '^L[0-9]+$' AND CAST(SUBSTRING(split_part(SW_NO, '-', 3) FROM 2) AS INTEGER) = CAST(#{levelNo} AS INTEGER)

SELECT tree.TREE_CD AS id , COALESCE(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent , tree.TREE_NM AS text , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level" , CASE WHEN tree.UPPER_TREE_CD IS NULL THEN 'root' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_SW_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN 'group' ELSE 'item' END AS "type" , tree.SORT_ORDER AS sort , COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_SW_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN '' ELSE 'swTreeCd' END AS filterType , tree.TREE_NM AS filterValue , tree.TREE_CD AS swTreeCd , '' AS distributeTypeCd FROM DOCS_SW_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY tree.TREE_PATH, tree.SORT_ORDER, tree.TREE_NM

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT A1.* FROM ( SELECT info.* , insertuser.USER_NM AS insertUserNm , updateUser.USER_NM AS updateUserNm
FROM ( SELECT info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS businessTypeNm, info.SW_TYPE_CD AS swTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('swTypeCd', info.SW_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS swTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD AS distributeTypeCd, -- FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS distributeTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_NAME AS distributeTypeNm, info.SW_NO AS swNo, info.SW_NM AS swNm, info.SW_VERSION_No AS swVersionNo, info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, info.REV_NO AS revNo, info.INSERT_UID AS insertUid, info.UPDATE_UID AS updateUid, info.ecn_insert_uid AS ecn_insert_uid, info.REGISTER_USER AS registerUser, info.INSERT_DEPT_NM AS insertDeptNm, info.STD_GAPP_DT AS stdGappDt, info.CHANGE_GAPP_DT AS changeGappDt, info.ECN_NO AS ecnNo, info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('businessAreaCdAll', info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, 'ko') AS businessAreaNm, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYnView, info.UPDATE_DT AS updateDt, info.INSERT_DT AS insertDt, info.CREATE_DT AS createDt, info.INTERFACE_DT AS interfaceDt, info.PRODUCT_CD AS productCd, COALESCE(info.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS productNm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW_FILE swFile WHERE swFile.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID) AS fileCount, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY SW_NO ORDER BY REV_NO DESC) AS rnk, fileInfo.FILE_NO AS fileNo, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm, fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, info.VALID_TYPE AS validType FROM DOCS_SW_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_SW info ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID
FROM ( SELECT info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS businessTypeNm, info.SW_TYPE_CD AS swTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('swTypeCd', info.SW_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS swTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD AS distributeTypeCd, -- FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS distributeTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_NAME AS distributeTypeNm, info.SW_NO AS swNo, info.SW_NM AS swNm, info.SW_VERSION_No AS swVersionNo, info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, info.REV_NO AS revNo, info.INSERT_UID AS insertUid, info.UPDATE_UID AS updateUid, info.ecn_insert_uid AS ecn_insert_uid, info.REGISTER_USER AS registerUser, info.INSERT_DEPT_NM AS insertDeptNm, info.STD_GAPP_DT AS stdGappDt, info.CHANGE_GAPP_DT AS changeGappDt, info.ECN_NO AS ecnNo, info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('businessAreaCdAll', info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, 'ko') AS businessAreaNm, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYnView, info.UPDATE_DT AS updateDt, info.INSERT_DT AS insertDt, info.CREATE_DT AS createDt, info.INTERFACE_DT AS interfaceDt, info.PRODUCT_CD AS productCd, COALESCE(info.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS productNm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW_FILE swFile WHERE swFile.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID) AS fileCount, fileInfo.FILE_NO AS fileNo, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm, fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, info.VALID_TYPE AS validType FROM DOCS_SW_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_SW info ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND info.DELETED_YN = 'N'
AND BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{businessTypeCd}
AND BUSINESS_AREA_CD LIKE '%' || #{businessAreaCd} || '%'
AND SW_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{swNo}))
AND SW_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{swNo})) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_SW_TREE node JOIN DOCS_SW_TREE selectedNode ON selectedNode.TREE_CD IN
#{treeCd}
WHERE node.TREE_CD = info.TREE_CD AND node.TREE_PATH LIKE selectedNode.TREE_PATH || '%' )
AND info.SW_NM LIKE '%' || #{swNm} || '%'
AND ( fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM LIKE '%' || #{fileViewNm} || '%' OR fileInfo.FILE_NM LIKE '%' || #{fileViewNm} || '%' )
AND fileInfo.FILE_NM LIKE '%' || #{fileNm} || '%'
AND SW_TYPE_CD LIKE '%' || #{swTypeCd} || '%'
AND info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{distributeTypeCd}
AND ECN_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{ecnNo})) || '%'
AND PRODUCT_CD = #{productCd}
AND INSERT_UID = #{insertUid}
AND VALID_TYPE IS NULL
AND VALID_TYPE = 'N'
AND info.INTERFACE_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{interfaceStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{interfaceEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 DAY'
AND(
(SW_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{swInfo.swNo})) || '%')
)
AND(
(SW_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{swInfo.swNo})) )
)
) info LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON insertUser.USER_ID = info.insertUid LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER updateUser ON updateUser.USER_ID = info.updateUid
WHERE rnk = 1
) A1 WHERE 1=1 ) B1
mapper.insert:
/* */ SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0)+1 AS cnSerial FROM DOCS_SW
/* DOCS_SW 추가 */ INSERT INTO DOCS_SW ( OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INSERT_DT, CCBDATE, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, TREE_CD, SW_NO, SW_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, PROTECT_YN, INSERT_UID, REV_NO, SW_VERSION_NO, DOC_VERSION_NO, APPROVER, REVIEWERUSER, APPROVED_USERS, STATUS, INTERFACE_DT, REGISTER_USER, SW_TYPE_CD) VALUES ( #{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(NULLIF(#{ccbIssueDt}, '') AS DATE), #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd}, #{businessTypeCd}, #{treeCd}, #{swNo}, #{fileNm}, #{distributeTypeCd}, #{protectYn}, #{sessionUser.userId}, #{revNo}, #{swVersion}, #{docVersion}, #{approver}, #{reviewerUser}, '', #{statusCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), #{swType})

/* 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0)+0 AS cnSerial FROM DOCS_SW
/* DOCS_SW_FILE 추가 */ INSERT INTO DOCS_SW_FILE ( OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INTERFACE_DT, FILE_SIZE, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NO, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_PATH_NM, REGISTER_USER, PROCESSING_STATUS, PROCESSING_ERROR, PROCESSED_AT) VALUES ( #{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{fileSize}, #{orgFileNm}, #{fileNo}, #{distributeTypeCd}, #{filePath}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), 'DONE', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FILE_NO), 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE WHERE PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{parentObjectId}
INSERT INTO DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE (OBJECT_ID, PARENT_OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_SIZE, USE_YN, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT) VALUES (#{objectId}, #{parentObjectId}, CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER), #{orgFileNm}, #{filePath}, CAST(#{fileSize} AS BIGINT), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, COALESCE(info.INSERT_UID, '') AS insertUid, COALESCE(insertUser.USER_NM, COALESCE(info.REGISTER_USER, '')) AS insertUserNm, COALESCE(info.APPROVER, '') AS approver, COALESCE(info.REVIEWERUSER, '') AS reviewerUser, COALESCE(info.APPROVED_USERS, '') AS approvedUsers, COALESCE(info.STATUS, '') AS status, COALESCE(info.REV_NO, '') AS revNo, COALESCE(info.DELETED_YN, 'N') AS deletedYn FROM DOCS_SW info LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON insertUser.USER_ID = info.INSERT_UID WHERE info.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_SW SET APPROVED_USERS = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = split_part(#{approvedUser}, '|', 1) ) THEN COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(APPROVED_USERS), ''), '') = '' THEN #{approvedUser} ELSE COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') || ',' || #{approvedUser} END, STATUS = CASE WHEN #{isFinal} = 'Y' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '승인진행중' END WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'

UPDATE DOCS_SW_FILE SET FILE_PATH_NM = #{filePath}, FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize}, PROCESSING_STATUS = 'DONE', PROCESSING_ERROR = NULL, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1
UPDATE DOCS_SW_FILE SET PROCESSING_STATUS = 'FAIL', PROCESSING_ERROR = #{errorMessage}, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1
mapper.select: SELECT sw.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", sw.SW_NO AS "swNo", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", COALESCE(fileInfo.PROCESSING_STATUS, '') AS "processingStatus", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_SW sw JOIN DOCS_SW_FILE fileInfo ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = sw.OBJECT_ID WHERE sw.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(sw.DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT fileInfo.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID AS "parentObjectId", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE fileInfo WHERE fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(fileInfo.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER)
SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", APPROVER_ID AS "approverId", COALESCE(COMMENT_TXT, '') AS "comment" FROM DOCS_SW_APPROVAL_COMMENT WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DOCS_SW_APPROVAL_COMMENT ( OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID, COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{approverId}, #{comment}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID) DO UPDATE SET COMMENT_TXT = EXCLUDED.COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT u.USER_NM AS "userName", u.USER_ID AS "userId", COALESCE(p.POSITION_NM, '') AS "positionName" FROM DOCS_USER u LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION p ON p.POSITION_CD = u.POSITION_CD WHERE (u.USER_NM IN
#{name}
OR u.USER_ID IN
#{name} )
